title: Dynamic Behavior Cloning With Temporal Feature Prediction: Enhancing Robotic Arm Manipulation in Moving Object Tasks
title_zh: 动态行为克隆与时间特征预测：增强机械臂在移动物体任务中的操作能力
abstract: In numerous real-world applications, the ability to accurately perceive and respond to dynamic changes in the environment, while also maintaining the flexibility to transfer learned skills across different tasks, is crucial for the effective operation of robotic arms. Behavior cloning is particularly promising in this context due to its data efficiency and strong task transferability, enabling robots to quickly adapt to new tasks by learning from demonstrations. However, traditional behavior cloning methods, which rely primarily on the observation and state information of the current frame to predict subsequent actions, fall short in dynamic contexts due to their static nature. To address this limitation, we propose Dynamic Behavior Cloning with Temporal Feature Prediction (DBC-TFP), which integrates with behavior cloning by leveraging historical frames to capture dynamic features crucial for predicting future scene images. This method uses a loss function based on the mean squared error (MSE) between the predicted future scene image and the ground truth counterpart, improving the model's accuracy in action prediction for dynamic scenarios. To evaluate our approach, we design a benchmark comprising eight task scenarios, including six foundational tasks and two advanced tasks. Experimental results on this benchmark demonstrate that DBC-TFP significantly improves the success rate of behavior cloning in dynamic scenarios compared to traditional behavior cloning methods.
abstract_zh: 在众多实际应用中，准确感知并响应环境动态变化，同时保持跨任务迁移学习技能的灵活性，对于机械臂的有效操作至关重要。行为克隆因其数据效率高和任务迁移性强而在此背景下极具前景，使机器人能够通过观察示范快速适应新任务。然而，传统行为克隆方法主要依赖当前帧的观测和状态信息来预测后续动作，由于其静态特性，在动态场景中表现不足。为解决这一局限，我们提出了动态行为克隆与时间特征预测（DBC-TFP），该方法通过利用历史帧捕获预测未来场景图像所需的关键动态特征，与行为克隆相结合。该方法使用基于预测未来场景图像与真实图像之间均方误差（MSE）的损失函数，提高了模型在动态场景中动作预测的准确性。为评估我们的方法，我们设计了一个包含八个任务场景的基准测试，包括六个基础任务和两个高级任务。在该基准上的实验结果表明，与传统行为克隆方法相比，DBC-TFP显著提高了动态场景中行为克隆的成功率。
tldr_zh: 提出DBC-TFP方法，利用历史帧预测未来场景，提升机械臂在动态任务中的行为克隆成功率。
cover_zh: 机械臂也能预判未来？新方法让动态抓取成功率飙升
